prompts.text: Explain what an API is to someone who has never programmed before.
Write a short email declining a meeting invitation politely.
What are three things I should consider before adopting a dog?
Explain the difference between machine learning and deep learning.
Write a Python function that reverses a string without using slicing.
I'm feeling overwhelmed at work. What are some practical strategies to manage stress?
Summarize the key ideas of the scientific method in 3-4 sentences.
Write a professional Slack message asking a colleague for help debugging an issue.
What are the pros and cons of working remotely versus in an office?
Explain how HTTPS keeps your data secure when browsing the web.
Write a function in Python that checks if two strings are anagrams of each other.
I just started a new job and want to make a good impression. Any tips?
Describe how a search engine like Google finds and ranks web pages.
Write a short product description for a reusable water bottle aimed at hikers.
What is the difference between a list and a tuple in Python? When should I use each?
Explain what a database index is and why it makes queries faster.
Write a commit message for a change that fixes a bug where user emails were not validated.
What are some effective ways to learn a new programming language?
Explain the concept of recursion using a real-world analogy.
Write a brief README introduction for an open-source todo list app.
